steps.t: According to Othor, there is a food stall run by Haradrim towards the southern end of West Pelargir. You should find it.
You have found the food stall in West Pelargir. You should talk to Jódha to order food.
Jódha has finished cooking your food. You should talk to her at her food stall in West Pelargir.
You have retrieved the food for Othor, Nasar, and the other Corsairs. You should return to them near the West Pelargir gates.
Nasar waits near the West Pelargir gates. He seems to want to talk to you.
